tool_args.label: Total overtime favorable YTD variance major drivers

payload.claim_text: Major drivers of the favorable non-reimbursable YTD variance, including lower general maintenance, inspections, and SAP requirements at NYCT; lower requirements at B&T; lower maintenance requirements and vacancy/absentee coverage at the LIRR; favorable weather, staggered shifts, and revised T&E crew requirements at MNR; revised MTAPD deployment assumptions at MTAHQ; and lower maintenance, less traffic congestion and unscheduled service at MTA Bus.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Major drivers of the favorable non-reimbursable YTD variance, including lower general maintenance, inspections, and SAP requirements at NYCT; lower requirements at B&T; lower maintenance requirements and vacancy/absentee coverage at the LIRR; favorable weather, staggered shifts, and revised T&E crew requirements at MNR; revised MTAPD deployment assumptions at MTAHQ; and lower maintenance, less traffic congestion and unscheduled service at MTA Bus.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Total overtime unfavorable reimbursable variance drivers

payload.claim_text: Unfavorable reimbursable YTD variance resulted from higher vacancy coverage requirements at NYCT; higher capital project activity at MNR and the LIRR; and higher coverage requirements for MTAPD at MTA HQ.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Unfavorable reimbursable YTD variance resulted from higher vacancy coverage requirements at NYCT; higher capital project activity at MNR and the LIRR; and higher coverage requirements for MTAPD at MTA HQ.
